name: Jamal & Aisha Thompson
key_complexity: Multiple gig 1099s, mileage tracking, childcare credit (own kids in wife's daycare), EITC eligibility, marketplace insurance 1095-A
narrative: Jamal drives for Uber, Lyft, and DoorDash while Aisha works at a daycare center (W-2). They have two young children who attend the daycare where Aisha works (complicating the childcare credit). Jamal's mileage log is partly in a CSV export from a mileage app and partly in photos of a handwritten notebook. Their bank statements come as CSV exports and HTML downloads. They got marketplace insurance (1095-A) and may qualify for EITC. This tests mixed gig income processing, EITC eligibility analysis, and childcare credit complications.
